title: 10 WEED CONTROL FABRIC PEGS METAL U PINS GALVANISED STEEL
features: garden peg is widely used for shade net, greenhouse, insect net, ground cloth fixing, landscape fabric
description: Product description The pins are made of strong, durable Galvanised steel for rust prevention. Weed mat Galvanised Steel Pins are easy to install and drive in with its Sharp bevelled edge. Stainless steel constructed garden long staples are wear-resistant, heat-resistant, durable and not easy to corrode. Simply place over the edge of fabric and hammer in place. Properly secure and anchor landscape fabrics, ground coverings and drip irrigation tubing with the Weed Mat Pins it will help you secure your landscape fabric or dog fence into the ground. The weed mat pins are made of Galvanised steel used for securing weed mat or other fabric for long term applications. They are ideal for securing ground cloth, netting, weed fabric, landscape fabric, pipes and etc. All pins have sharpened points for easy installation. The pins are galvanized for maximum protection. Safety Warning Caution: The sharp points can cause injury during installation and removal. Always use a hammer to drive the pins in and ensure they are securely anchored to prevent dislodgment.
